headline: Is AMETEK (AME) Pricing Too Rich After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether AMETEK stock is offering fair value at around US$224.52, its current pricing raises some interesting questions that are worth unpacking before you make any decisions. The stock has slipped about 1.5% over the past week and 2.6% over the past month. It still sits up 7.4% year to date and 27.2% over the past year, with a 3 year return of 54.5% and a 5 year return of 71.7%. Recent coverage has focused on AMETEK's position as a capital goods company listed on the...
